actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Tiny Venomous Threat - Low-level poison source with amphibious capability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses amphibious movement for versatile positioning in mixed terrain
tactical_info.damage_output: 7 total damage (4 piercing + 3 poison) per bite
tactical_info.key_abilities: Poison damage, amphibious movement, small size stealth
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP, limited blindsight range
tactical_info.synergies: Good for swamp encounters, environmental hazards, or swarm support
